data.title: 国际服活动复刻「Special Summer Mission! RABBIT Squad and the Mystery of the Missing Shrimp」
data.summary: [Event Update Notice] The "Special Summer Mission! RABBIT Squad and the Mystery of the Missing Shrim
data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

The "Special Summer Mission! RABBIT Squad and the Mystery of the Missing Shrimp" event is back! Sensei, this is your chance to recruit 1★ Miyu (Swimsuit)!

#BlueArchive
